bugs.title: Activity Type "Playing"
bugs.description: The activity type "Playing" currently does NOT work. The selection of this Type is currently disabled on the newest version.
If a YouTube or YouTube Music ad is playing, it will show the time of the ad and might not re-fix itself after the ad is done.

bugs.title: Youtube: Multiple Channels
bugs.description: If the playing Youtube Video has multiple channels, it will say "Unknown Author".

bugs.title: Youtube Livestreams
bugs.description:
The timer behaves weirdly if you have "Show current time of the video" and/or "Show length of the video" enabled. Shortly:
Both Disabled: Tracks session duration
Both Enabled: Shows runtime out of +1 hour
Only "Show current time of the video" Enabled: Shows stream runtime (breaks on long-duration streams like LofiGirl)
Only "Show length of the video" Enabled: Counts down from 1 hour

bugs.title: Seeking/Minimizing/Maximizing Youtube Music
bugs.description: If you seek while the song is minimized, minimize or maximize it, it sometimes resets the time to 0 but after like 4 seconds it jumps back to the correct time.

bugs.title: Internet Connection Issues
bugs.description: If you loose youre internet connection and reconnect, the time of the video/song might be wrong. This will be fixed on the next update i.e. next song, pausing, resuming or seeking.
